title: 3.   Draw two line segments of different lengths as shown in Fig. 2.
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: 3.   Draw two line segments of different lengths as shown in Fig. 2.
objective: To verify that the sum of four angles of a quadrilateral is 360 °
materials:
Cardboard, coloured glaze paper, colours, ruler,
pencil, drawing sheet, scissors, tracing paper.
procedure:
1.   Take a cardboard of convenient size and
cover it with a light coloured glaze paper.
2.   Take   a   drawing   sheet   and   draw   a
quadrilateral on it.
3.   Cut it out and paste it on the cardboard.
Name it as ABCD (Fig.1).
Make a trace copy of the quadrilateral ABCD.
4.   Colour the four angles with different colours in both the quadrilaterals
(Fig. 2).
Fig. 2
discussion:
This activity will help in understanding the shape of a kite and all its
properties.
Fig. 3
